prediction.reasoning: The prediction for COST in 22 days is based on a Geometric Brownian Motion (GBM) model. Historical daily logarithmic returns over the past 2 years (from 2022-06-03 to 2024-05-31) were used to estimate the drift (mean daily return: 0.0009) and volatility (standard deviation of daily returns: 0.0135). The point estimate is the expected value from this GBM model. Confidence intervals are derived from the log-normal distribution properties of the stock price, accounting for the estimated drift and volatility over the 22-trading-day period. This method assumes past market behavior is indicative of future movements, which may not always be the case, especially given unforeseen market events or company-specific news. All price values are rounded to two decimal places.
